mapper.select: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM sales_order so JOIN sales_order_detail sod ON sod.so_id = so.so_id WHERE so.so_id=#{salesOrderId} AND so.status='REQUESTED' )

select p.product_id, p.product_code, p.product_name, p.maker_name, p.is_prescription, p.storage_type, p.status as pro_status, il.lot_no, il.expiry_date, il.current_qty, il.location, il.status as lot_status from product p join inventory_lot il on p.product_id = il.product_id where p.PRODUCT_ID = #{productId}

select SUM(il.current_qty) from product p join inventory_lot il on p.product_id = il.product_id where p.product_id = #{productId} and il.status='NORMAL' and il.current_qty > 0 and il.expiry_date >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) + 11 group by p.product_id

select p.product_id, p.product_code, p.product_name, p.maker_name, p.status as pro_status, il.lot_no, il.expiry_date, il.current_qty, il.location, il.status as lot_status from product p join inventory_lot il on p.product_id = il.product_id where p.product_id = #{productId} and p.status='ACTIVE' and il.status='NORMAL' and il.current_qty > 0 and il.expiry_date >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) + 11 order by il.expiry_date
SELECT so.so_id, so.status FROM sales_order so WHERE so.so_id=#{salesOrderId} AND so.status='REQUESTED'
SELECT so.so_id, so.status FROM sales_order so

select so.so_id, so.customer_id, cu.customer_name, req_em.emp_id as req_employee_id, req_em.emp_name as req_employee_name, so.approve_emp_id as app_employee_id, app_em.emp_name as app_employee_name, so.order_date, so.approve_date, so.status, so.total_amount, so.memo, so.created_at, so.updated_at from sales_order so join customer cu on so.customer_id = cu.customer_id join employee req_em on req_em.emp_id = so.request_emp_id left join employee app_em on app_em.emp_id = so.approve_emp_id where so.so_id=#{soId}
select sod.so_id, sod.so_detail_id, sod.order_qty, sod.unit_price, sod.amount from sales_order_detail sod where sod.so_id=#{soId}
mapper.insert: insert into sales_order ( SO_ID, CUSTOMER_ID, REQUEST_EMP_ID, ORDER_DATE, STATUS, TOTAL_AMOUNT, CREATED_AT ) select #{soId}, #{customerId}, #{reqEmployeeId}, #{orderDate}, #{status}, #{totalAmount}, SYSDATE from customer c where c.customer_id= #{customerId}
mapper.select: SELECT pr.product_id,pr.status,pr.standard_sales_price FROM product pr WHERE pr.product_id=#{productId} AND pr.status='ACTIVE' AND pr.standard_sales_price > 0
mapper.insert: insert into sales_order_detail ( SO_DETAIL_ID, SO_ID, PRODUCT_ID, ORDER_QTY, UNIT_PRICE, AMOUNT ) values ( #{soDetailId}, #{soId}, #{productId}, #{orderQty}, #{unitPrice}, #{amount} )
mapper.select: SELECT so_id, customer_id, status, total_amount, detail_amount_sum, header_detail_amount_matched_yn as headerAmountMatched, detail_line_count, detail_calculated_amount_sum, detail_amount_calculated_matched_yn as detailAmountMatched FROM v_sales_order_amount_check vsac WHERE vsac.so_id=#{soId}
